_comment: Target spec for gemv_hfq4g256_residual — Phase 14 kernel authoring.
kernel_purpose: Fused HFQ4-G256 GEMV with residual add: y = A*x + residual. Saves one kernel launch and the residual write round-trip to HBM. Used in the residual path of Q/K/V/O projections.
_gfx12_note: A gfx12 variant may exist; check kernels/src/ at runtime. The harness script checks for it.

kernel_args.name: y
kernel_args.desc: output = GEMV(A,x) + residual, float32, length M

correctness.check_method: element-wise max abs diff vs reference (gemv_hfq4g256 output + residual)

known_negative_results.description: __builtin_amdgcn_s_prefetch adds overhead on gfx1201 in the residual path — do NOT use prefetch in this kernel without re-measuring.
known_negative_results.lesson: Prefetch hurts on RDNA4 for short-stride patterns. Try LDS staging of residual[] instead.
